home.heroTitle: Hämäränkävijät opens a doorway into Finnish mythology.
home.heroBody: Hämäränkävijät is a story-led tabletop RPG rooted in Finnish mythology. This site guides you through the world, learning uses, and downloadable material.

audienceItems.title: Players
audienceItems.body: A fast way into the setting, tone, and collaborative style of play.

audienceItems.title: Educators
audienceItems.body: Practical use cases for classrooms, clubs, and guided group activities.

audienceItems.title: Libraries and youth groups
audienceItems.body: Low-friction formats for running shared storytelling sessions.

audienceItems.title: Followers
audienceItems.body: Blog updates covering playtesting, worldbuilding, and next releases.

home.newsletterBody: Subscribe for development notes, playtest calls, and release updates.

story.heroTitle: What is the story behind Hämäränkävijät?
story.heroBody: Hämäränkävijät combines Finnish mythology, collaborative storytelling, and approachable tabletop play for different experience levels.

audienceItems.title: Mythic grounding
audienceItems.body: The world draws from Finnish folklore while staying open to player interpretation.

audienceItems.title: Shared narrative
audienceItems.body: Each table shapes the journey together, creating unique campaign outcomes.

audienceItems.title: Clear play loop
audienceItems.body: Rules stay lightweight so groups can focus on choices, scenes, and momentum.

story.journalBody: Start with the world overview here, then follow the blog for evolving lore and design updates.

educators.heroBody: Hämäränkävijät supports classroom learning, youth work, and club facilitation through structured storytelling.

audienceItems.title: Language and expression
audienceItems.body: Scenario prompts encourage reading, speaking, and creative writing outcomes.

audienceItems.title: Collaboration skills
audienceItems.body: Play naturally trains turn-taking, listening, and collective problem-solving.

audienceItems.title: Cultural context
audienceItems.body: Finnish mythology gives a concrete frame for culture and history discussions.

educators.contactBody: Use the Downloads page to access starter resources and printable support files.

downloads.heroBody: This page collects downloadable material that supports sessions, facilitation, and onboarding.

audienceItems.title: Quickstart sheet
audienceItems.body: A compact first-session guide for new groups.

audienceItems.title: Educator framework
audienceItems.body: A session template for classroom and club use.

audienceItems.title: Printable character sheets
audienceItems.body: Ready-to-print sheets for rapid table setup.

downloads.newsletterBody: We announce new downloadable resources in blog updates.

blog.heroBody: Updates from playtesting, worldbuilding, and release planning.
